name: mcp_server
description: MCP Server for CaDoodle Application - Provides tools to interact with the CaDoodle 3D modeling MCP server over TCP
author: CaDoodle Team

tools.name: mcp_initialize
tools.description: Initialize connection to the MCP server

tools.name: mcp_get_current_state
tools.description: Get current state of the CaDoodleFile including operation count and CSG list

tools.name: mcp_get_csgs
tools.description: Get list of all CSGs with details including bounds, vertex count, and properties

names.description: List of CSG names to select

tools.name: mcp_add_operation
tools.description: Add an operation to the CaDoodleFile

operation_type.description: Type of operation (Align, Delete, ExtrudeSurface, Fillet, Group, Hide, LinearDistribution, Lock, Mirror, Paste, RadialDistribution, Resize, SetMaterial, Show, ToHole, ToSolid, UnGroup, UnLock, WireMeshView)

tools.name: mcp_remove_operation
tools.description: Remove an operation from the CaDoodleFile

operation_id.description: ID of the operation to remove

tools.name: mcp_regenerate
tools.description: Regenerate operations from a source operation

tools.name: mcp_get_parameters
tools.description: Get parameters for a specific CSG

tools.name: mcp_set_bounds
tools.description: Set bounds for a specific CSG

tools.name: mcp_get_shapes_palette
tools.description: Get shapes palette as structured JSON
